title: Crossopetalum tonduzii
taxonomy: Crossopetalum tonduzii is classified within the plant family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Crossopetalum, which comprises a group of flowering plants. The species Crossopetalum tonduzii is native to Central America and is known for its unique characteristics. The plant's classification is further supported by its morphological features, including its leaf and flower structure. The classification of Crossopetalum tonduzii reflects its evolutionary relationships with other species within the Celastraceae family.
